mapper.sql: select tu.id, tu.task_id, tu.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, tu.task_role, tu.can_evaluate, tu.can_upload, tu.can_view, tu.assigned_by, tu.assigned_time from ndt_task_user tu left join sys_user u on u.user_id = tu.user_id
mapper.insert: insert into ndt_task_user (task_id, user_id, task_role, can_evaluate, can_upload, can_view, assigned_by, assigned_time) values (#{taskId}, #{userId}, #{taskRole}, #{canEvaluate}, #{canUpload}, #{canView}, #{assignedBy}, sysdate())
